title: Apex | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Apex

## [Supported tools and frameworks](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/apex/#supported-tools-and-frameworks "Supported tools and frameworks")

SalesForce Lightning Components (Aura Components or Web Components)

## [Language-Specific Properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/apex/#language-specific-properties "Language-Specific Properties")

Discover and update the Apex-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") in the project **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **Apex**

## [Related Pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/apex/#related-pages "Related Pages")

- [External analyzer reports](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/enriching/external-analyzer-reports/ "External analyzer reports") (PMD Apex)
- [Test coverage](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/enriching/test-coverage/test-coverage-parameters/ "Test coverage") (For Salesforce DX project)
